narrative:
North Canton 1-B (precinct in Stark County) has 1,224 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.2 percentage points.
